ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa ransomware BYOVD driver drop (smol.sys/smuol.sys) chained with Defender tampering
ucs.description: Hunts Medusa's signature anti-EDR step: dropping a renamed vulnerable kernel driver (smol.sys / smuol.sys / abyssworker.sys per CISA AA25-071A IOCs) and immediately disabling Windows Defender via registry tamper or service install on the same host within ~10 minutes. The named-driver pattern is specific to Medusa affiliates, not generic BYOVD activity.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.action IN ("created","renamed") AND (Filesystem.file_name IN ("smol.sys","smuol.sys","abyssworker.sys") OR (Filesystem.file_name="*.sys" AND Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\Windows\\Temp\\*","*\\PerfLogs\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*"))) by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name _time span=1m | rename Filesystem.* AS * | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where Registry.action="modified" AND (Registry.registry_path IN ("*\\Services\\smol\\*","*\\Services\\smuol\\*","*\\Services\\smol","*\\Services\\smuol") OR Registry.registry_value_name IN ("DisableAntiSpyware","DisableRealtimeMonitoring","DisableBehaviorMonitoring","DisableIOAVProtection") OR Registry.registry_path="*\\Windows Defender\\Exclusions\\*") by Registry.dest Registry.registry_path Registry.registry_value_name Registry.registry_value_data Registry.process_name _time | rename Registry.* AS *, _time AS reg_time, process_name AS reg_process | eval reg_time=reg_time] | where reg_time>=relative_time(_time,"-10m") AND reg_time<=relative_time(_time,"+10m") | table _time reg_time dest user file_name file_path process_name registry_path registry_value_name registry_value_data reg_process | sort - _time
ucs.kql:
let WindowMin = 10m;
let MedusaDrivers = dynamic(["smol.sys","smuol.sys","abyssworker.sys"]);
let DriverDrops =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where FileName in~ (MedusaDrivers)
       or (FileName endswith ".sys"
           and FolderPath has_any (@"\Windows\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\"))
    | where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              DriverName = FileName, DriverPath = FolderPath, DriverSHA256 = SHA256,
              DropAccount = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              DropProcess = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              DropCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
let DefenderTamper =
    DeviceRegistryEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
    | where RegistryKey has_any (@"\Services\smol", @"\Services\smuol", @"\Services\abyssworker")
       or RegistryValueName in~ ("DisableAntiSpyware","DisableRealtimeMonitoring","DisableBehaviorMonitoring","DisableIOAVProtection","DisableScanOnRealtimeEnable","TamperProtection")
       or RegistryKey has @"Microsoft\Windows Defender\Exclusions"
    | project TamperTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              RegistryKey, RegistryValueName, RegistryValueData,
              TamperProcess = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              TamperCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
DriverDrops
| join kind=inner DefenderTamper on DeviceId
| where TamperTime between (DropTime - WindowMin .. DropTime + WindowMin)
| project DropTime, TamperTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', TamperTime, DropTime),
          DeviceName, DropAccount,
          DriverName, DriverPath, DriverSHA256,
          DropProcess, DropCmd,
          RegistryKey, RegistryValueName, RegistryValueData,
          TamperProcess, TamperCmd
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let WindowMin = 10m;
let MedusaDrivers = dynamic(["smol.sys","smuol.sys","abyssworker.sys"]);
let DriverDrops =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where TargetFileName in~ (MedusaDrivers)
       or (TargetFileName endswith ".sys"
           and TargetFilePath has_any (@"\Windows\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\"))
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | project DropTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
              DriverName = TargetFileName, DriverPath = TargetFilePath,
              DriverSHA256 = TargetFileSHA256,
              DropAccount = ActorUsername, DropProcess = ActingProcessName,
              DropCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine;
let DefenderTamper =
    ImRegistryEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
    | where RegistryKey has_any (@"\Services\smol", @"\Services\smuol", @"\Services\abyssworker")
       or RegistryValue in~ ("DisableAntiSpyware","DisableRealtimeMonitoring","DisableBehaviorMonitoring","DisableIOAVProtection","TamperProtection")
       or RegistryKey has @"Microsoft\Windows Defender\Exclusions"
    | project TamperTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
              RegistryKey, RegistryValue, RegistryValueData,
              TamperProcess = ActingProcessName, TamperCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine;
DriverDrops
| join kind=inner DefenderTamper on DvcHostname
| where TamperTime between (DropTime - WindowMin .. DropTime + WindowMin)
| project DropTime, TamperTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', TamperTime, DropTime),
          DvcHostname, DropAccount,
          DriverName, DriverPath, DriverSHA256,
          RegistryKey, RegistryValue, RegistryValueData,
          DropProcess, TamperProcess
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.rationale: CISA #StopRansomware: Medusa (AA25-071A) attributes the specific renamed-vulnerable-driver filenames smol.sys / smuol.sys (and ABYSSWORKER variants) directly to Medusa affiliate tradecraft for EDR-blinding before encryption. Generic BYOVD detections fire on RTCore64.sys / kavfm.sys / GMER drivers used by many crews; pinning the file-name list + immediate Defender registry tamper inside ~10 minutes

ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa pre-encryption cascade: bcdedit/vssadmin recovery sabotage + .medusa or !!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!! drop
ucs.description: Hunts the Medusa impact cascade: on the same host within 30 minutes, anti-recovery commands (bcdedit recoveryenabled No / bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures, vssadmin/wmic shadow-copy delete, wevtutil log clear) AND a Medusa-specific filesystem artefact (.medusa-extension file, !!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt ransom note, or the gaze.exe payload). The named ransom-note + extension combination is Medusa's unique fingerprint vs other LockBit-style affiliates.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as anti_recovery_time max(_time) as anti_recovery_last values(Processes.process) as anti_recovery_cmd values(Processes.process_name) as anti_recovery_bin from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="wevtutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*cl *") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*Win32_Shadowcopy*Delete*" OR Processes.process="*Remove-WmiObject*Win32_Shadowcopy*"))) AND Processes.user!="*$" by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=1m | rename Processes.* AS * | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=t count values(Filesystem.file_name) as medusa_artefact values(Filesystem.file_path) as medusa_path from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.action IN ("created","renamed") AND (Filesystem.file_name="*.medusa" OR Filesystem.file_name="!!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt" OR Filesystem.file_name="!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt" OR Filesystem.file_name="gaze.exe") by Filesystem.dest _time | rename Filesystem.* AS *, _time AS artefact_time] | where artefact_time>=relative_time(_time,"-30m") AND artefact_time<=relative_time(_time,"+30m") | table _time artefact_time dest user anti_recovery_bin anti_recovery_cmd medusa_artefact medusa_path | sort - _time
ucs.kql:
let Lookback = 1d;
let WindowMin = 30m;
let AntiRecovery =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","No")
                                          or ProcessCommandLine has_all ("bootstatuspolicy","ignoreallfailures")))
        or (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
        or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"     and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
        or (FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "cl ")
        or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
    | project AntiRecoveryTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              AntiRecoveryBin = FileName, AntiRecoveryCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              AntiRecoveryParent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
let MedusaArtefacts =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where FileName endswith ".medusa"
        or FileName =~ "!!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt"
        or FileName =~ "!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt"
        or FileName matches regex @"(?i)^!{1,3}READ[_ ]?ME[_ ]?MEDUSA!{1,3}\.txt$"
        or FileName =~ "gaze.exe"
    | project ArtefactTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              MedusaArtefact = FileName, ArtefactPath = FolderPath,
              ArtefactSHA256 = SHA256,
              ArtefactWriter = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ArtefactWriterCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
AntiRecovery
| join kind=inner MedusaArtefacts on DeviceId
| where ArtefactTime between (AntiRecoveryTime - WindowMin .. AntiRecoveryTime + WindowMin)
| summarize AntiRecoveryCmds = make_set(AntiRecoveryCmd, 32),
            AntiRecoveryBins = make_set(AntiRecoveryBin, 16),
            MedusaArtefacts  = make_set(MedusaArtefact, 64),
            ArtefactPaths    = make_set(ArtefactPath, 32),
            ArtefactWriters  = make_set(ArtefactWriter, 16),
            FirstAntiRecovery = min(AntiRecoveryTime),
            FirstArtefact     = min(ArtefactTime),
            LastEvent         = max(ArtefactTime)
            by DeviceName, AccountName
| order by LastEvent desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let Lookback = 1d;
let WindowMin = 30m;
let AntiRecovery =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where AccountType == "User"
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe" and (CommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","No")
                                                       or CommandLine has_all ("bootstatuspolicy","ignoreallfailures")))
        or (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
        or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
        or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wevtutil.exe" and CommandLine has "cl ")
        or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe")
            and CommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
    | project AntiRecoveryTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              AntiRecoveryBin = NewProcessName, AntiRecoveryCmd = CommandLine,
              AntiRecoveryParent = ParentProcessName;
let MedusaArtefacts =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".medusa"
        or TargetFileName =~ "!!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt"
        or TargetFileName =~ "!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt"
        or TargetFileName matches regex @"(?i)^!{1,3}READ[_ ]?ME[_ ]?MEDUSA!{1,3}\.txt$"
        or TargetFileName =~ "gaze.exe"
    | project ArtefactTime = TimeGenerated, Computer = DvcHostname,
              MedusaArtefact = TargetFileName, ArtefactPath = TargetFilePath,
              ArtefactSHA256 = TargetFileSHA256,
              ArtefactWriter = ActingProcessName;
AntiRecovery
| join kind=inner MedusaArtefacts on Computer
| where ArtefactTime between (AntiRecoveryTime - WindowMin .. AntiRecoveryTime + WindowMin)
| summarize AntiRecoveryCmds = make_set(AntiRecoveryCmd, 32),
            AntiRecoveryBins = make_set(AntiRecoveryBin, 16),
            MedusaArtefacts  = make_set(MedusaArtefact, 64),
            ArtefactPaths    = make_set(ArtefactPath, 32),
            ArtefactWriters  = make_set(ArtefactWriter, 16),
            FirstAntiRecovery = min(AntiRecoveryTime),
            FirstArtefact     = min(ArtefactTime),
            LastEvent         = max(ArtefactTime)
            by Computer, Account
| order by LastEvent desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Medusa Ransomware Filesystem Fingerprint (.medusa / READ_ME_MEDUSA / gaze.exe)
id: 8d2c4f1b-9a7e-4e5f-b9c3-medusa-fs-fp01
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of files matching Medusa ransomware's canonical artefacts - the .medusa file extension, !!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt ransom note, or the gaze.exe payload binary. Per CISA AA25-071A.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa25-071a
author: SOC Detection Eng
date: 2025/03/12
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_ext:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.medusa'
  selection_note:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\!!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt'
      - '\!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt'
      - '\!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!.txt'
  selection_payload:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '\gaze.exe'
  condition: 1 of selection_*
fields:
  - Image
  - TargetFilename
  - User
  - CommandLine
falsepositives:
  - Security tooling test files containing these exact filenames
level: critical
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.t1490
  - detection.dfir
ucs.rationale: The .medusa extension, the literal !!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!.txt ransom-note filename, and the gaze.exe payload binary are unique fingerprints of Medusa (formally tracked by CISA in AA25-071A and Mandiant/Microsoft reporting; not a shared affiliate-toolkit name like Conti's readme.txt or LockBit's restore-my-files.txt). Pairing the Medusa filename indicator with the anti-recovery cascade (bcdedit recov
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
